description: 163 - 02-04-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson, Matthew Collins (Deputy National Security Adviser, CO), Mungo Woodifield (Minister Counsellor for Trade and Global Issues.
text:
Security Adviser, CO), Mungo Woodifield (Minister Counsellor for Trade and Global Issues.

FCDO) and others

From: Peter Mandelson[Personal

Sent: Wed 02/04/2025 8:40:38 PM (UTC)
To: Christian Turner[Personal

Subject: Fw:*** and tech partnership

Full read out on ***

Lord Mandelson

HM Ambassador. Washinaton DC

Personal | Personal

From: Matthew Collins

Sent: 02 April 2025 14:37

To: Mungo Woodifield

Cc: Mian, Emran (DSIT) ; Rhys Bowen ; Jonathan Black (Cabinet Office) (External) ; Peter Mandelson
Subject: Re: ** and tech partnership

Thanks for the read out. Good to know where we are. Let's see what happens next !!

Matt Collins
Deputy National Security Adviser Intelligence, Defence and Security
70 Whitehall, London, SW1A 2AS

PS: JCS
APS: JCS
Diary: JCS

On Wed, 2 Apr 2025 at 15:53, Mungo Woodifield <Personal
wrote:
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Matt, all
Just a heads up that HMA
Readout is on higher tier. At the very end of the meeting, HMA asked about trade
and tech partnership.

eK

RK

Mungo
Mungo Woodifield
Minister Counsellor, Trade & Global Issues

British Embassy Washington
Personal

469
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
